name: claude-md-parallel-audit
description: Multi-agent parallel audit of CLAUDE.md (or similar agent-instruction files such as CLAUDE.local.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md) for HIGH-severity quality issues. Dispatches N independent subagents, aggregates findings by reproducibility (≥4/9 default), distinguishes new fixable defects from already-accepted architectural tensions, and proposes targeted fixes.
